nl.en: How many delayed flights last week had compensation over $1,000?
nl.ko: 지난주 보상금이 $1,000을 초과한 지연 항공편은 몇 건입니까?
nl.ja: 先週、補償金が $1,000 を超えた遅延便は何件ですか?
nl.zh: 上周补偿金额超过 $1,000 的延误航班有多少?
nl.hi: पिछले हफ़्ते $1,000 से ज़्यादा compensation वाली कितनी flights में देरी हुई?

queries.kql:
delayed_flights
| where last_7_days(actual_arr)
| join compensation on flight_id
| where amount > 1000
| summarize count=count(), total=sum(amount), avg=avg(amount), top_route=top(1, route)

nl.en: Top 5 routes by delay last month
nl.ko: 지난달 지연 시간 기준 상위 5개 노선
nl.ja: 先月の遅延時間が最も多い上位 5 路線
nl.zh: 上月延误时长 Top 5 航线
nl.hi: पिछले महीने delay के हिसाब से Top 5 routes

queries.kql: flights | where last_30_days(actual_arr) | where delay_minutes > 15 | summarize count=count() by route | order by count desc | take 5

nl.en: Average compensation per airline this quarter
nl.ja: 今四半期、航空会社別の平均補償金
nl.zh: 本季度各航空公司的平均补偿金额
nl.hi: इस तिमाही में airline-वार average compensation

queries.kql: compensation | join airlines on airline_id | where quarter='2026Q2' | summarize avg=avg(amount) by airline_name | order by avg desc

nl.ja: 整備イベントが最も多い機体
nl.hi: सबसे ज़्यादा maintenance events वाले aircraft

queries.kql: aircraft | join maintenance on aircraft_id | where quarter='2026Q2' | summarize events=count() by aircraft_id, model | order by events desc | take 3

nl.ja: すべての航空会社を一覧表示

vpAnswer.source: Fabric IQ ontology · live query · 1.9s · ⭐ first 5/7/2026 trace

queries.kql: airlines | project airline_id, name | order by name asc
